problem_solved: State Medicaid and managed care organizations struggle to reliably coordinate non-emergency medical transportation for vulnerable populations while preventing fraud and ensuring quality
solution_description: Minority-owned NEMT management company (formerly Southeastrans) providing comprehensive transportation broker services: call center, eligibility verification, claims management, provider credentialing, utilization review, and fraud/waste/abuse mitigation. Proprietary NET Insight GPS tracking technology for real-time vehicle monitoring
notes: Rebranded from Southeastrans. Strong regional presence in AR, GA, IN, LA, TN, DC. Proprietary mobile technology for providers. Medium Varden fit - payer-focused NEMT broker.
